episodes.title: Synanon
episodes.description: This week, Mom tells the story of something right in her backyard - Synanon — the organization that started as a drug rehabilitation program, but slowly transformed into something far more disturbing. What began with the goal of helping people recover eventually became known for strict control, intense group tactics, and a leader whose power continued to grow unchecked. From “The Game” to the group’s increasingly bizarre and dangerous behavior, Synanon’s story has become one of the most infamous cult-like organizations in American history. Photos from this episode can be found here Have spooky stories or specific topics you want to hear us dive into? Email us at ⁠momimscaredpod@gmail.com⁠ New episodes are released every Wednesday at 12am PST/3AM EST. If you enjoy our show, please consider following, rating and reviewing on Spotify & Apple Podcasts and following us on Instagram & TikTok ! Original music by the amazing Goldmyth
